title: Assessment Output Prefills
description: Prefill templates for structured assessment outputs. Per Anthropic consistency guidelines, prefills force JSON output starting with the expected structure.

revops_audit.description: Forces JSON output starting with RevOps audit metadata. Agent must continue with timestamp and remaining structure.
revops_audit.usage: Begin your response with exactly this prefill, then continue with the ISO 8601 timestamp and remaining JSON structure.

cpq_assessment.description: Forces JSON output starting with CPQ assessment metadata. Agent must continue with timestamp and remaining structure.
cpq_assessment.usage: Begin your response with exactly this prefill, then continue with the ISO 8601 timestamp and remaining JSON structure.

funnel_diagnostic.description: Forces JSON output starting with funnel diagnostic metadata. Agent must continue with timestamp and remaining structure.
funnel_diagnostic.usage: Begin your response with exactly this prefill, then continue with the ISO 8601 timestamp and remaining JSON structure.

automation_audit.description: Forces JSON output starting with automation audit metadata. Agent must continue with timestamp and remaining structure.
automation_audit.usage: Begin your response with exactly this prefill, then continue with the ISO 8601 timestamp and remaining JSON structure.

integration_notes.api_usage: Prefills work best with direct API calls where assistant turn can be pre-populated. For agent prompts, include instruction: 'Begin your response with exactly: {prefill}'
integration_notes.agent_prompt_pattern: When using prefills in agent prompts, add this instruction at the end of output requirements: 'Begin your JSON output with: {prefill_string}'
integration_notes.validation: Response should be parseable as JSON after removing any XML wrapper tags from self-correction protocol
